# XCTestObservation

**Protocol**

A protocol that defines methods the test runner calls in response to significant events during test runs.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol XCTestObservation : NSObjectProtocol
```

## Overview

The system calls the notification methods for [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation] in the following sequence for a test bundle:

1. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testBundleWillStart(_:)] — exactly once per test bundle
2. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testSuiteWillStart(_:)] — exactly once per test suite
3. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testCaseWillStart(_:)] — exactly once per test case
4. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testCase(_:didRecord:)-4cou6]  — for each test failure, zero or more times per test case at any point between test case start and finish
5. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testCase(_:didRecord:)-8k955]  — for each expected test failure, zero or more times per test case at any point between test case start and finish
6. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testCaseDidFinish(_:)] — exactly once per test case
7. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testSuite(_:didRecord:)-3rk9k] — for each test failure, zero or more times per test suite at any point between test suite start and finish
8. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testSuite(_:didRecord:)-1xjkv] — for each expected test failure, zero or more times per test suite at any point between test suite start and finish
9. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testSuiteDidFinish(_:)] — exactly once per test suite
10. [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservation/testBundleDidFinish(_:)] — exactly once per test bundle

See [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestObservationCenter] for details about registering and removing test observers.

## Observation Methods

- **testBundleWillStart(_:)**: Notifies the observer immediately before any tests in a test bundle begin.
- **testSuiteWillStart(_:)**: Notifies the observer immediately before a test suite begins executing.
- **testCaseWillStart(_:)**: Notifies the observer immediately before a test case begins executing.
- **testCase(_:didRecord:)**: Notifies the observer when a test case reports an issue.
- **testCase(_:didRecord:)**: Notifies the observer when a test case records an expected failure.
- **testCase(_:didFailWithDescription:inFile:atLine:)**: Notifies the observer when a test case reports a failure.
- **testCaseDidFinish(_:)**: Notifies the observer immediately after a test case finishes executing.
- **testSuite(_:didRecord:)**: Notifies the observer when a test suite reports an issue.
- **testSuite(_:didRecord:)**: Notifies the observer when a test suite records an expected failure.
- **testSuite(_:didFailWithDescription:inFile:atLine:)**: Notifies the observer when a test suite reports a failure.
- **testSuiteDidFinish(_:)**: Notifies the observer immediately after a test suite finishes executing.
- **testBundleDidFinish(_:)**: Notifies the observer immediately after all tests in a test bundle finish executing.

## Test Observation

- **XCTestObservationCenter**: Provides information about the progress of test runs to registered observers.

## Inherits From

- NSObjectProtocol
